name: Tomato and Basil Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Quickly roll out the pastry and cut out six 4-5-inch rounds.
2. Place the rounds on a thick baking sheet and sprinkle with a little cold water.
3. Place the baking sheet in the freezer until ready to assemble and bake the tarts.
4. Slice the tomatoes and lay them on paper towels for thirty minutes to drain off excess moisture. This will prevent the tarts from being soggy.
5. One hour before serving, preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
6. Take the baking sheet out of the freezer and spread a layer of Thick Tomato Coulis over the pastry rounds, leaving a half-inch rim around the edge.
7. Arrange the drained tomato slices over the coulis and scatter with shredded basil.
8. Sprinkle with salt and some freshly grated black pepper, then drizzle with oil.
9. Immediately place in the oven and bake for 20 minutes or until the pastry is puffed and golden.
10. Serve at once.
